creator: bzeeb-lists@lists.zabbadoz.net
text:
Hi,

I own a 162XTA2 card as well.

Unfortunately mine is, for an unkonwn reason, operating in
"cardbus/laptop" mode as I had found out starting adding
support to ata.  Imho the linux driver did not handle that
case either.

I guess the el-cheapo card here has some "weired" wiring
or missing a pull-up. I did investigate any further time
on that 1500ct card.


/bz

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb                                 bzeeb at Zabbadoz dot NeT
Software is harder than hardware  so better get it right the first time.
